productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Canvas Dark Brown Leather Wallet
description: Spice up your style with this fashionable yet spacious wallet from wrangler. While it is well organised to allow you to carry a lot of your essentials conveniently, it looks absolutely fabulous with any outfit, upping your style statement. Made of pure leather with textile lining Fabric cover on the front for added style and structure Stitch detailing on the cover with appliquéd brand logo in leather casing Two main chambers for keeping cash Convenient chambers for storing cards Concealed chamber below coin and card holder to store other essentials CareWipe dust with a dry, clean cloth
